[observation] [info] Add scenario-style integration tests mirroring real shell misuse to validate guard enforcement end-to-end.

<insights>

- Clarify the API surface for guard/commands.ts so the three imports back into hench remain thin adapters rather than full dependencies.
- Keep policy.ts aligned with contracts.ts and document how guard/index.ts is exposed so teams can safely extend guard behaviors.
- Leverage the strong test presence to add scenario-based guard integration tests reflecting real shell/tool misuse cases.
- Clarify guard/commands.ts API so the three imports into hench stay thin adapters instead of deep dependencies.
- Document how guard/index.ts exposes policies/contracts so contributors extend guard logic without breaking invariants.
- Add scenario-style integration tests mirroring real shell misuse to validate guard enforcement end-to-end.
